title: Ally Pack
description: Ally Pack is an add on Data Pack for Pride pack, an LGBTQ+ Resource Pack made by Pridecraft Studios
body:
# Allypack

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/761UM4OD?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20downloads&color=%231bd96a&style=for-the-badge) ![GitHub Downloads (all assets, all releases)](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/pridecraft-studios/allypack/total?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github%20Downloads) ![GitHub commit activity](https://img.shields.io/github/commit-activity/t/pridecraft-studios/allypack?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)

This is Allypack, an addon for [Pridepack](https://modrinth.com/mod/pridepack)
made by [Pridecraft Studios](https://pridecraft.gay).
When used with [Pridepack](https://modrinth.com/mod/pridepack) it adds many LGBTQ+
Pride additions, including paintings, <!-- Music Discs --> and more!

## Donate

You can support the developers of Pridecraft Studios by donating on Patreon

[![patreon](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/donate/patreon-singular_vector.svg)](https://donate.pridecraft.gay)

<!-- Remove the html comment when posting on Modrinth, Curse or MCPEDL

<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/ZyazvpZAmGU?autoplay=1&rel=0" width="560" height="315" title="Pridepack Trailer" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe> -->

## Screenshots

None yet! Stay tuned.

## Who

Pridecraft Studios is a collective modding group that creates resource packs, tooling, and our flagship mod, Joy.
Our team of volunteers strive to create prideful content for the diverse Minecraft community <3.
We target both Java and Bedrock editions, hoping to create memorable experiences for you.
